action.reasoning: Observation: CLIP+linear+KD got 75.41%. Later tasks suffer (66.8% for task 9) likely due to KD interference and linear classifier limitations. Analysis: KD forces model to preserve old logits including random values for unseen classes, which conflicts with learning new classes. Cosine classifier is better suited for class-IL. Decision: Switch to cosine classifier, remove KD (full replay + CE is sufficient since features are frozen), add prototype initialization for new classes, increase to 50 epochs.
